geography.data_source: CMDA master plan 2026 peri-urban expansion zones, GCC extended boundary areas, Tiruvallur district fringe

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Tiruvallur district tables (fringe villages), rapid unplanned growth estimated at 5.0% CAGR post-2015

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round (2020-21) Tamil Nadu peri-urban tables, Census 2011 village-level occupation data for Tiruvallur fringe, PLFS 2022-23

commute_profile.data_source: CMP Chennai 2018 peri-urban transport survey, MTC route data for outskirt routes, very long commute due to low connectivity

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Estimated from low-income peri-urban zone patterns, highest fare sensitivity due to long commutes on low incomes, slow information diffusion in sprawl zone

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from peri-urban social patterns, village-origin kinship networks persist in fringe areas, very low tier2 density in under-served zone

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from peri-urban junction market activity, low footfall due to dispersed population
Estimated from construction labour gathering points on arterial roads in peri-urban Chennai

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Periurban/Low Connectivity template from AGENT_SPEC.md, directly applicable to outer Chennai expansion zone

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from peri-urban governance structure, mix of GCC and panchayat leadership, labour contractor presence for construction work
